title: News Brief
scenario: Write a 40-word summary of a news article. The summary should include the article title, a brief overview of the main points, and a concluding sentence with the article's key takeaway.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone of the summary is neutral and impartial.
Verify if the summary accurately represents the news article's main points.
Check if the summary is under 40 words.
